name: Cultivation World
description:
Join a randomly generated Cultivation World and enjoy a peaceful life or reach towards the Heavens, or maybe you want to lead a sect, a merchant caravan, become an Alchemy or Blacksmithing genius or maybe you want to dual cultivate or have your own harem or go poke on it and catch spirt pets, anything's possible, even transcending and traveling to modern Earth!
